name: zwo
description: Install ZWO camera drivers, ASI Studio, and ASCOM driver.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$log = Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\zwo-verify.log'; $smoke = Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\zwo-smoke.txt'; $a1 = 'C:\Program Files\ASIStudio\ASIStudio.exe'; $a2 = 'C:\Program Files (x86)\ASIStudio\ASIStudio.exe'; if ((Test-Path -LiteralPath $a1) -or (Test-Path -LiteralPath $a2)) { Set-Content -Path $log -Value 'ZWO ASI Studio installed'; Set-Content -Path $smoke -Value 'zwo_ok' } else { 'ASIStudio.exe not found under Program Files' | Out-File -FilePath $log -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }"
